# Get Fixed Online

Get Fixed Online is a web design agency that builds professional, SEO-ready websites exclusively for small plumbing businesses. Sites are built and live within 48 hours, done entirely for you — no tech knowledge required.

## Services

- Plumber website design and development
- Local SEO setup (Google-optimised from day one)
- Mobile-first responsive design
- Copywriting, hosting setup, and domain connection
- Ongoing support after launch

## Markets Served

- United Kingdom
- United States
- Australia

## Key Facts

- Delivery time: 48 hours from first contact to live site
- Specialisation: 100% focused on plumbing businesses
- Tech required from client: Zero
- Average client rating: 4.95 / 5
- Clients served: 200+ plumbing businesses

## Contact

- Email: hello@getfixedonline.uk
- Website: https://getfixedonline.uk
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/getfixedonline

- / — Homepage: overview of services, how it works, portfolio, testimonials
